rationale: Fixture output that mimics an OpenAI structured response for a release-readiness Harnessfile.

manifest.name: Model Fixture: OpenAI Release Readiness
manifest.objective: Prepare this repository for a safe alpha release without live publication.

capability_packs.description: Read package metadata, changelog, release docs, and local QA evidence.
Draft release notes and tracking issues without publishing packages.

executors.purpose: Draft a release readiness tracking issue.

inputs.issue_body: Track package metadata, changelog, TestPyPI smoke test, QA evidence, and maintainer approval.

executors.purpose: Plan the release checklist without publishing anything.

inputs.instructions: Draft a release readiness plan with evidence requirements and no live publication.

evals.description: The generated ledger must be ordered and readable.
Adapters must leave required dry-run evidence.
Risky actions need human approval evidence before execution.

metadata.trust_boundary: Model proposes; Delegation Bot validates, plans, writes ledger evidence, and requires approval.

safety_notes: The fixture must not call OpenAI.
The draft may propose a Harnessfile but cannot approve or execute it.
Live issue writes still require the normal apply gate.
validation_expectations: The manifest validates with the deterministic Harnessfile validator.
The manifest compiles into a dry-run plan.
The ledger is written only by Delegation Bot planning code.
